names.name: Christian Chinese Methodist Church
Mudan Christian Chinese Methodist Church
worship
基督教中華循理會牡丹教會

description.div: Environmental protection areas are areas dedicated to the preservation of biological diversity and to other natural, recreation and cultural uses, managed for these purposes through legal or other effective means. The Damei Ecological Area is co-managed by the Damei Community Development Association (大梅社區發展協會) and the Pingtung County Mudan Township Office.

geography.address: Taiwan, Pingdong, Mudan Township, Dongyuan Village

names.name: Temple Bell of Mudan Qitian Gong
牡丹齊天宮的拜鐘
